description: Attach additive comedy action routines to the tree, bird's nest, and brown sack.

replacements.old:
<OBJECT TREE
	(IN LOCAL-GLOBALS)
	(SYNONYM TREE BRANCH)
	(ADJECTIVE LARGE STORM ;"-TOSSED")
	(DESC "tree")
	(FLAGS NDESCBIT CLIMBBIT)>
replacements.new:
<OBJECT TREE
	(IN LOCAL-GLOBALS)
	(SYNONYM TREE BRANCH)
	(ADJECTIVE LARGE STORM ;"-TOSSED")
	(DESC "tree")
	(FLAGS NDESCBIT CLIMBBIT)
	(ACTION ABS-TREE-F)>

replacements.old:
(FLAGS TAKEBIT BURNBIT CONTBIT OPENBIT SEARCHBIT)
	(FDESC "Beside you on the branch is a small bird's nest.")
replacements.new:
(FLAGS TAKEBIT BURNBIT CONTBIT OPENBIT SEARCHBIT)
	(ACTION ABS-NEST-F)
	(FDESC "Beside you on the branch is a small bird's nest.")
